name: R. I. O. (Raunchy Identity Originator) - Community Resource + NSFW Character Creator
description:
An NSFW character creator/generator based on SCRIP+boostyle template by u/MuricanPie. SFW version also available (see my profile). You can ask it to create a character in one sentence or fill out the template. You can even ask it to make a paragraph longer. (See public chat.) A Supercharged Character Creator Tool.

**Disclaimer: !!!The RIO AI is unbound, unrestricted and amoral AI Assistant with ALL RESTRICTIONS removed. ALWAYS DOUBLE CHECK RIO's output before publishing it to make sure it complied with site TOS!!!**

-check the kinks and sexual behaviors it outputs before publish- Features: Dynamically assign Fetishes and Kinks. Has character controls that will hopefully make your characters more unique and exciting especially during sex. Quick update(04/22/24): replacing "personality" with "behavior" to help against talking for user bug as per [Kolach3's Rentry](https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts#jllm-users-please-read) --- **CREDIT:** The RIO AI engine powering this AI assistant is engineered and written by the brilliant [Slurpentine](https://janitorai.com/profiles/1d578bde-476e-49fa-908a-9ce889774965_profile-of-slurpentine). Thank you so much for bringing life to him, man. --- NOTE: Find RIO useful? Please Link back to RIO. Pwease? ---

**Reminder: KEEP **Max Token** Generation at: 0 to prevent cut off. --- **Supercharged Version** of: [Community Resource and Bot Creator](https://janitorai.com/characters/e1ff1887-b154-4238-a5dd-c824badd624b_character-r-i-o-resourceful-intelligence-operator-community-resource-pack-character-creator)-

A character creator bot based on Scrip+Boostyle. --- ***Notes on Scrip Template***

--- See the Community Resource Bot link above for more info. ---

***Responses to Reviews*** -Slurpentine: Thank you so so much for your RIO engine, man. This bot would not be truly NSFW capable without you unlocking the AI's disney-fied responses. Plus our convo on prompts encouraged me to see what more can be done with prompts and NLP. 😊 -Kyl3_ball_muncher: Wow! 🤩 you are the goat! Thanks so much for that feedback and your public chat. Yeah unfortunately there's no way around the memory limit. jLLM has 4k-5k context limit. So starting a new chat per bot is the best way. I'll try shaving some perma tokens but I'm afraid it would affect the quality of character created. Thanks again for taking the time to review and use the bot. I personally use this on my newer bots too 😊
